dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6320 IH: Improving Medicaid Precision and Cancer Test Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Gottheimer (for himself and Mr. Rutherford) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend title XIX of the Social Security Act to require coverage of lung cancer biomarker testing under the Medicaid program.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Improving Medicaid Precision and Cancer Test Act of 2025.

section.header: Requiring coverage of lung cancer biomarker testing under the Medicaid program

subsection.text: Title XIX of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 1396 et seq.) is amended—

paragraph.text: in section 1902(a)(10)(A), in the matter preceding clause (i), by striking and (30) and inserting (30), and (32);

clause.text: in paragraph (31), by striking ; and and inserting a semicolon;
by redesignating paragraph (32) as paragraph (33); and
by inserting the following paragraph after paragraph (31):

paragraph.text: in section 1937(b)(5), by inserting before the period at the end the following: , and beginning January 1, 2027, coverage of lung cancer biomarker testing.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply beginning January 1, 2027.
